construction: GS-family flat lookup over the PINNED B2 training bytes: QA index (trained question pair -> answer) + aligned fact-line index ((subject-name, object-name) -> stated word); NO joins, NO inference (DECONF-A1 GS lineage, certificate.projection_answer analog)
